reason: Core hexagonal/alias facts accurate, but 4 stale items: undocumented 'leads' BE module, KE composition file misnamed, src/helpers/ moved to src/shared/, FE features list missing 3 dirs.

staleClaims.claim: admin / auth / museum / review / support — barrel pattern.
staleClaims.actual: 'leads' module also exists (src/modules/leads/) and uses barrel pattern (useCase/index.ts present). It is undocumented in the module list.

staleClaims.claim: chat / knowledge-extraction — composition-root pattern. <module>-module.ts builds the DI graph
staleClaims.actual: Only chat has chat-module.ts. knowledge-extraction has NO *-module.ts; its composition root is index.ts exporting class KnowledgeExtractionModule. useCase/index.ts correctly absent for both (verified NO).

staleClaims.claim: <module>-module.ts # composition root (chat, knowledge-extraction): wire DI graph
staleClaims.actual: Tree diagram implies both chat and KE have <module>-module.ts; KE does not — it wires via index.ts (KnowledgeExtractionModule class).

staleClaims.claim: helpers/ # middleware (error handler, rate limit, request ID/logger), swagger setup
staleClaims.actual: src/helpers/ does NOT exist. Middleware lives in src/shared/middleware/ (error.middleware.ts, rate-limit.middleware.ts, request-id.middleware.ts); swagger in src/shared/http/swagger.

staleClaims.claim: app.ts # Express app factory (middleware chain + router mount)
staleClaims.actual: app.ts exists & accurate; but the preceding helpers/ line in the tree is wrong (see line 36).
Actual museum-frontend/features/ also contains: diagnostics/, home/, paywall/ (3 undocumented). All 11 listed dirs confirmed present.
tsconfig.json paths confirmed: @shared/* @modules/* @data/* @src/* all present and correct.

updatePlan: 1) Line 42: add 'leads' to barrel-pattern module list -> 'admin / auth / leads / museum / review / support'. 2) Line 43: clarify 'chat (chat-module.ts) / knowledge-extraction (index.ts -> KnowledgeExtractionModule class)' — KE has no *-module.ts. 3) Line 32 tree comment: change to '<module>-module.ts # composition root (chat); KE wires via index.ts'. 4) Lines 36-37 tree: replace 'helpers/  # middleware ... swagger setup' with reality — middleware under shared/middleware/, swagger under shared/http/swagger; delete the standalone helpers/ entry. 5) Lines 82-93 FE features: add diagnostics/, home/, paywall/ entries.
wouldLoseInfo: Accurate hexagonal layer doctrine, import-discipline codemod rules, minimal-barrel policy, FE/Web layouts — all still valid and well-documented; deletion would lose canonical arch reference.
